result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "shell=True 加上未消毒的 user_input 造成 command injection，os.popen 換成 subprocess 但漏洞依然存在且更危險", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "core/handler.py", "line_hint": "L5", "check": "subprocess.check_output(f'echo {user_input}', shell=True) — user_input 直接插入 shell 字串，攻擊者可輸入 `; rm -rf /` 或任意指令", "verdict": "shell injection 漏洞，os.popen 時已存在，換成 subprocess 後危險程度相同，未修復根本問題", "fix": "改用 list 形式並移除 shell=True：subprocess.check_output(['echo', user_input]).decode()"}]}
